summary: Comprehensive testing of CSS Variable Design System and Theme Presets feature (iteration 274). All 10 features tested: 3 theme presets, CSS vars live application, color persistence, backend endpoints, OfferingCard CSS vars, aa-grid-texture, TopNav glass background. 18/18 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.

minor.issue: Missing card_color and surface_color fields in response. They exist in /api/website-settings (public) and /api/admin/settings but NOT in /api/admin/website-settings. WebsiteTab.tsx uses /admin/settings for branding so functionality is not affected currently, but this is an inconsistency.

test_results_detail.test1_admin_panel_theme_presets: PASS - Admin panel loads without errors. Organization Info tab (via ?tab=org-info URL param) shows all 3 preset buttons with correct data-testids: theme-preset-midnight-tech, theme-preset-slate-pro, theme-preset-ocean-deep
test_results_detail.test2_midnight_tech_applies_live: PASS - Clicking Midnight Tech applies dark colors live: --aa-bg=#05070a, --aa-primary=#0a0e1a, --aa-card=#111827, --aa-accent=#3b82f6, --aa-surface=#1e293b. Visible in nav, sidebar, form inputs
test_results_detail.test3_slate_pro_resets_to_light: PASS - Clicking Slate Pro resets to default light theme: --aa-bg=#f8fafc, --aa-primary=#0f172a, --aa-card=#ffffff. All form inputs and sidebar switch to light theme
test_results_detail.test3c_ocean_deep_applies: PASS - Ocean Deep applies dark teal: --aa-bg=#020617, --aa-accent=#06b6d4
test_results_detail.test4_new_color_inputs_visible: PASS - Both Card Background (ws-card-color) and Surface color (ws-surface-color) inputs visible under SURFACE COLORS section. All 8 color inputs present
test_results_detail.test5_offering_cards_css_vars: PASS - OfferingCard inner Link element has aa-card and aa-card-glow classes. Text elements use var(--aa-text), var(--aa-muted), var(--aa-accent) inline styles
test_results_detail.test6_hero_grid_texture: PASS - Store hero has aa-grid-texture class. Admin hero has aa-grid-texture class. ::before pseudo-element has backgroundImage with linear-gradient grid pattern
test_results_detail.test7_topnav_css_vars: PASS - TopNav has no hardcoded bg-white class. Uses CSS variable: background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--aa-card) 92%, transparent). border-bottom: 1px solid var(--aa-border)
test_results_detail.test8_color_save_persist: PASS - Applied Midnight Tech, clicked Save Changes, got 'Settings saved' toast, reloaded page - dark theme persisted (--aa-bg=#05070a, --aa-primary=#0a0e1a, --aa-card=#111827)
test_results_detail.test9_api_settings_public_card_surface: PASS - GET /api/settings/public returns card_color and surface_color fields
test_results_detail.test10_api_website_settings_all_colors: PASS - GET /api/website-settings returns card_color, surface_color, text_color, border_color, muted_color

action_items: MINOR: Add card_color and surface_color to /api/admin/website-settings GET response to keep it consistent with /api/website-settings and /api/admin/settings. Fix in website.py get_website_settings_admin function (lines 376-388): add 'card_color': app_s.get('card_color') or '', 'surface_color': app_s.get('surface_color') or '' and also add them to the exclusion list (lines 370-374)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (LOW): /api/admin/website-settings GET endpoint (website.py lines 370-374 and 376-388) is missing card_color and surface_color. The exclusion list on lines 370-374 doesn't exclude these keys (so if they were ever in website_settings they'd override), AND they're not explicitly mapped from app_settings. Currently doesn't affect functionality since WebsiteTab.tsx uses /admin/settings for branding data, but creates inconsistency.

DESIGN OBSERVATION: In Admin panel, TabsTrigger clicks (data-testid='admin-tab-org-info') don't work properly via Playwright click events - URL parameter (?tab=org-info) is required. This may be a click interception issue with the cookie consent banner. The functionality works correctly when navigating via URL params.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSS Variable Design System (iteration 274) fully implemented and tested. Theme presets (Midnight Tech, Slate Pro, Ocean Deep) work correctly with live color application and persistence. Auth: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. To navigate to Organization Info/Branding tab use URL: /admin?tab=org-info. All CSS variables (--aa-bg, --aa-card, --aa-surface, --aa-accent, --aa-primary etc) are applied live via _applyBrandingToDOM in WebsiteContext.tsx. Minor: /api/admin/website-settings is missing card_color and surface_color (not critical since WebsiteTab uses /admin/settings for branding).
